settings.html:
Home / Careers
Join the Mission

Be Part of India's Next

Medtech Revolution

At Bareilly Medtech Incubation & Innovation Labs (BMIIL), we're building more than an incubation center — we're building a movement. A movement that blends science and innovation, Ayurveda and modern medicine, local talent and global vision.

View Open RolesApply Now

Who We're Looking For

People who believe healthcare innovation should reach every corner of India.

🎓

Young Professionals & Graduates

Eager to learn the ropes of innovation management and make an impact from day one.

🔬

Researchers & Engineers

Passionate about medical technology, product development, and clinical problem-solving.

🧠

Mentors & Consultants

Domain experts who want to contribute their experience to India's growing medtech story.

🌍

Globally-minded Innovators

People who bring local insight and global ambition to demo days, investor pitches, and international exposure.

Why BMIIL

What you'll gain working here.

🏥

Hospital & Lab Access

Work directly inside BIU's teaching hospital, research labs, and clinical infrastructure.

🚀

Ground Floor Opportunity

Join at the founding stage — shape the culture, build the systems, define the direction.

📊

Demo Days & Investor Pitches

Get exposure to national and international investor events, pitch competitions, and healthcare forums.

🎯

Real Impact

Every role directly supports startups solving real healthcare problems for real patients.

Current Openings

We Are Hiring. Join Us.

Bareilly, Uttar Pradesh

Industry Mentor / Domain Expert

Advisory📍 Remote / Bareilly⏱ Part-time / Consulting
Apply Now →

Share your expertise with early-stage medtech startups. Guide founders through clinical validation, regulatory pathways, market strategy, and product development.

Domain ExpertiseMedtechHealthcareMentorship

Incubation Manager / Coordinator

Core Operations📍 Bareilly (On-site)⏱ Full-time
Apply Now →

Lead day-to-day operations of BMIIL's incubation programs — cohort intake, mentor scheduling, milestone tracking, lab coordination, and startup support across all three tracks.

Program ManagementOperationsHealthcareTeam Leadership

Research & Innovation Fellow

Research📍 Bareilly (On-site)⏱ Full-time / Fellowship
Apply Now →

Conduct research in medtech, Ayurveda innovation, and healthcare product development. Support startups with literature reviews, clinical evidence synthesis, and regulatory documentation.

ResearchMedical TechnologyAyurvedaDocumentation

Community & Events Associate

Marketing & Outreach📍 Bareilly / Hybrid⏱ Full-time
Apply Now →

Manage BMIIL's community engagement — events, workshops, demo days, and stakeholder communications. Build relationships with hospitals, colleges, and innovation ecosystems.

Event ManagementCommunity BuildingCommunicationsOutreach

Intern — Corporate Relations

Corporate Relations📍 Bareilly / Hybrid⏱ Internship (3–6 months)
Apply Now →

Support corporate partnerships, investor outreach, and stakeholder relationship management. Ideal for MBA or BBA students with strong communication skills.

Corporate RelationsPartnershipsCommunicationMBA / BBA

Intern — Social Media Cell

Marketing📍 Remote / Bareilly⏱ Internship (3–6 months)
Apply Now →

Create content for BMIIL's social media channels, manage campaigns, track analytics, and build awareness about our programs and milestones.

Social MediaContent CreationDesignMarketing

Don't see the right role? We'd love to hear from you.

Send us your CV and a note about what you'd bring to BMIIL. We're building fast.

Email Your CVFollow on LinkedIn

settings.editor: Send us your resume and tell us how you'd like to contribute. We review applications on a rolling basis.
